description: Compartmental model for ESBL and carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae transmission across hospital and community settings (Kachalov et al. 2021)

compartments.label: Colonized WT Community
compartments.description: Colonized with wild-type K. pneumoniae, untreated, community

compartments.label: Colonized ESBL Community
compartments.description: Colonized with ESBL-producing K. pneumoniae, untreated, community

compartments.label: Colonized CRK Community
compartments.description: Colonized with carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae, untreated, community

compartments.label: Colonized WT Hospital Drug A
compartments.description: Colonized WT, on cephalosporins, in hospital

compartments.label: Colonized WT Hospital Drug B
compartments.description: Colonized WT, on carbapenems, in hospital

compartments.label: Colonized ESBL Hospital Drug A
compartments.description: Colonized ESBL, on cephalosporins, in hospital

compartments.label: Colonized ESBL Hospital Drug B
compartments.description: Colonized ESBL, on carbapenems, in hospital

compartments.label: Colonized CRK Hospital Drug A
compartments.description: Colonized CRK, on cephalosporins, in hospital

compartments.label: Colonized CRK Hospital Drug B
compartments.description: Colonized CRK, on carbapenems, in hospital

compartments.label: Infected WT
compartments.description: Symptomatic bloodstream infection with wild-type K. pneumoniae

compartments.label: Infected ESBL
compartments.description: Symptomatic bloodstream infection with ESBL K. pneumoniae

compartments.label: Infected CRK
compartments.description: Symptomatic bloodstream infection with carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae

parameter.name: transmission_rate
parameter.label: Colonization Rate
parameter.description: Base community colonization rate for K. pneumoniae via contact with colonized individuals

parameter.name: transmission_rate
parameter.label: Natural Clearance Period
parameter.description: Average duration of K. pneumoniae colonization before natural decolonization

parameter.name: transmission_rate
parameter.label: Infection Development Period
parameter.description: Average days for a colonized individual to develop symptomatic bloodstream infection (hospital only)

parameter.name: transmission_rate
parameter.label: Recovery Period
parameter.description: Average duration of K. pneumoniae bloodstream infection

interventions.label: Antibiotic Stewardship
interventions.description: Hospital antibiotic stewardship program reducing inpatient antibiotic consumption

parameters.name: adherence_min
parameters.label: Adherence
parameters.description: Minimum population adherence to the intervention

parameters.name: transmission_percentage
parameters.label: Transmission Reduction
parameters.description: Percentage reduction in transmission while intervention is active

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.label: Start Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention begins (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.label: End Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention ends (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: start_threshold
parameters.label: Start Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population that triggers the intervention

parameters.name: end_threshold
parameters.label: End Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population below which the intervention stops

interventions.label: Hospital Infection Control
interventions.description: Enhanced infection prevention and control measures reducing nosocomial transmission rate

parameters.name: adherence_min
parameters.label: Adherence
parameters.description: Minimum population adherence to the intervention

parameters.name: transmission_percentage
parameters.label: Transmission Reduction
parameters.description: Percentage reduction in transmission while intervention is active

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.label: Start Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention begins (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.label: End Date
parameters.description: Date the intervention ends (leave blank for threshold-based)

parameters.name: start_threshold
parameters.label: Start Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population that triggers the intervention

parameters.name: end_threshold
parameters.label: End Threshold
parameters.description: Proportion of infected population below which the intervention stops

disease_parameters.name: hospital_transmission_mult
disease_parameters.label: Hospital Transmission Multiplier
disease_parameters.description: Factor by which nosocomial transmission exceeds community rate.  Varies by country: ~0.4 (Finland) to ~33 (Greece) in Kachalov et al.

disease_parameters.name: fitness_cost_esbl
disease_parameters.label: Fitness Cost ESBL (%)
disease_parameters.description: Relative fitness cost of ESBL strains vs. wild-type

disease_parameters.name: fitness_cost_crk
disease_parameters.label: Fitness Cost CRK (%)
disease_parameters.description: Relative fitness cost of carbapenem-resistant strains vs. wild-type

disease_parameters.name: super_colonization_coeff
disease_parameters.label: Super-colonization Coefficient
disease_parameters.description: Rate of super-colonization with horizontal gene transfer relative to primary colonization

disease_parameters.name: treatment_susceptibility
disease_parameters.label: Treatment Susceptibility Increase
disease_parameters.description: Factor by which antibiotic treatment increases susceptibility to colonization

disease_parameters.name: treatment_clearance_mult
disease_parameters.label: Treatment Clearance Multiplier
disease_parameters.description: How many times faster effective antibiotic treatment clears susceptible colonizing strains vs. natural clearance

disease_parameters.name: plasmid_loss_rate
disease_parameters.label: Plasmid Loss Rate
disease_parameters.description: Rate of resistance plasmid loss/displacement, expressed relative to natural decolonization rate

disease_parameters.name: import_esbl
disease_parameters.label: ESBL Import (per 100k)
disease_parameters.description: External introduction of ESBL strains as equivalent reservoir size per 100,000 population

disease_parameters.name: import_crk
disease_parameters.label: CRK Import (per 100k)
disease_parameters.description: External introduction of CRK strains as equivalent reservoir size per 100,000 population

disease_parameters.name: admission_rate
disease_parameters.label: Hospital Admission Rate
disease_parameters.description: Daily fraction of community population admitted to hospital

disease_parameters.name: discharge_rate
disease_parameters.label: Hospital Discharge Rate
disease_parameters.description: Daily fraction of hospital population discharged (1/mean LOS)

disease_parameters.name: ceph_consumption_community
disease_parameters.label: Community Cephalosporin Consumption
disease_parameters.description: 3rd/4th gen cephalosporin consumption in community (DDD per 1,000 inhabitants per day)

disease_parameters.name: ceph_consumption_hospital
disease_parameters.label: Hospital Cephalosporin Consumption
disease_parameters.description: 3rd/4th gen cephalosporin consumption in hospital (DDD per 1,000 patient-days)

disease_parameters.name: carb_consumption_hospital
disease_parameters.label: Hospital Carbapenem Consumption
disease_parameters.description: Carbapenem consumption in hospital (DDD per 1,000 patient-days)

disease_parameters.name: treatment_duration
disease_parameters.label: Treatment Duration
disease_parameters.description: Average duration of an antibiotic treatment course

simulation_parameters.name: run_mode
simulation_parameters.label: Run Mode
simulation_parameters.description: Run a single deterministic simulation or uncertainty analysis with multiple runs
